title: NumPy Library Core Concepts & Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the foundational elements of NumPy and their role in a typical data science workflow.
relationships: Data is converted from Python Lists into an ndarray for efficient computation
The ndarray is processed using ufuncs for element-wise operations
Aggregation methods summarize data (e.g., mean, sum)
Slicing & Indexing extracts specific subsets of data
The processed numerical results are used for machine learning, visualization, or analysis
